title: RFPResponse
description: A response / notice of interest submitted to an EDC solicitation (RFP / RFEI / RFQ / RFI). NET-NEW: there is NO public API and NO Open Data twin for responding to an EDC solicitation; today respondents register interest by email, at a pre-submission conference, or through a portal, then submit documents manually. This schema serves both the read surface (a respondent's own submissions) and the write surface (submit a response / register interest).

responseId.description: Server-assigned response / confirmation number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by EDC, not the respondent.

solicitationId.description: The Solicitation this response is for (RFP number / slug).

intent.description: What the respondent is doing — from a lightweight expression of interest to a full proposal submission.

type.description: e.g. Developer, Nonprofit, Contractor, Consultant, MWBE.

contact.description: Point of contact for the response.

message.description: Cover note, question text, or proposal summary.

documentUrls.description: Links to proposal documents the respondent is submitting.
